text:
“I saw that you were perfect, and I loved you. Then I saw that you were not perfect, and I loved you even more.”

- Angelita Lim
thread:
“I saw that you were perfect, and I loved you. Then I saw that you were not perfect, and I loved you even more.”

- Angelita Lim
reply:
i feel like this is how you know it’s actually real, when your heart softens rather than closes after the first disillusionment  
it’s so easy to love a fantasy, the test is loving someone earthy and flawed and particular
